flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Tennessee Wesleyan University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (43.5% → 35.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tennessee Wesleyan University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.6k → $30.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tennessee Wesleyan University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.6k → $30.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tennessee Wesleyan University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (962 → 846).
